name: Strawberry Sundae Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
2 10oz pkg frozen strawberries - thawed and in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed cookie crumbs with melted margarine. Press half of this mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, mix the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla. Fold in the whipped cream until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the pressed cookie crumbs in the prepared pan.
4. Blend the thawed strawberries, sugar, and lemon juice together in a blender or food processor until smooth.
5. Spoon 3/4 cup of the strawberry mixture evenly over the top of the cream layer.
6. Cover with the remaining cookie crumb mixture.
7. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours or until firm.
8. To prepare the sauce, mix the remaining strawberry mixture and cornstarch in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
9. Allow the sauce to cool before chilling.
10. Once set, cut the dessert into squares and serve with the sauce. Store leftovers in the freezer or refrigerate.
